chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Cr. B. A. No. 2221 of 2025 Date Order with Signature of Judge For hearing of bail application 1.For order on MA No. 12075/25 (urgent) 2.For order on MA No. 12076/25 (exemption) 3.For hearing of bail application 29.08.2025 Mr. Abbas Ali Saahar, Advocate a/w three Applicants ---------- 1. Urgency is granted. 2. Exemption is granted subject to all exceptions. 3. Three Applicants namely Manzoor Ali son of Abdul Hakeem Saahar, Ali Hyder son of Manzoor Ali and Masood Ahmed son of Gulab Khan Saahar, are present along with their Counsel to seek protective bail to enable them to appear before the Trial Court for seeking appropriate relief. Learned counsel for applicants submits that applicant are innocent and have been falsely implicated by complainant in Crime No. 103/2025 of PS Radhan, district Dadu, under Section 302/324/114/ 147/148/120-B/337H(ii) PPC and police is behind them to arrest them for harassment and humiliation and it is made difficult for them to approach the concerned Court for getting appropriate relief as such they have appeared before this Court for seeking protective bail. Without touching merits of the case, above named three applicants are granted protective bail for 10 days from today subject to furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.40,000/- each and PR bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of Nazir of this Court. This protective bail shall remain in force for 10 days from today or the date on which the applicants will surrender before the trial court, whichever is earlier. The protective bail application is disposed of. J U D G E Ashraf
